description_long: This shotgun features a compact, modern design with a predominantly white and black color scheme, accented by an orange muzzle tip and red highlights on the scope. The upper section is equipped with a large, cylindrical optical scope mounted on a rail, suggesting enhanced aiming capabilities. The main body is constructed from a smooth, molded material with ergonomic contours, including a prominent pistol grip and a secondary foregrip for stability. The trigger area is protected by a rounded, integrated guard, and the rear section lacks a traditional stock, instead curving downward in a pistol grip style. The barrel is relatively short and capped with an orange tip, indicating a non-lethal or training variant. The overall build appears lightweight and suitable for quick handling in urban environments.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a white and black body, large optical scope, and ergonomic pistol grip, featuring an orange muzzle tip and no traditional stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the large scope, ergonomic pistol grip, and orange muzzle tip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular scope lens, the orange muzzle tip, and the symmetrical design of the grips.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, body contours, and the white and black color contrast.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the scope's eyepiece, the trigger guard, and the alignment of the grips.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short with orange tip, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, integrated with the body, medium size, smooth with no finger grooves
